metadata.description: Super SOL — evidence-gated paired evaluation harness for coding agents

plugins.name: super-sol
plugins.description: Evidence-gated paired evaluation harness. One-command bootstrap (uv + Python 3.12 + offline dry-run smoke), guided dry-run and live crossover evaluations, and fail-closed aggregate reports. Live runs are billable and always require explicit confirmation; results below the preregistered threshold are reported as engineering evidence, never leaderboard claims.
